name: veyra-vscode
description: Veyra coordinates Claude, Codex, and Gemini through VS Code Chat and the Language Model provider.

chatParticipants.name: veyra
chatParticipants.description: Route work across Claude, Codex, and Gemini.

commands.name: review
commands.description: Have Claude, Codex, and Gemini run a read-only review in sequence.

commands.name: debate
commands.description: Have Claude, Codex, and Gemini run a read-only debate on the best approach.

commands.name: consensus
commands.description: Have Claude, Codex, and Gemini reach a read-only consensus recommendation.

commands.name: implement
commands.description: Run Claude, Codex, and Gemini as a serial implementation team.

chatParticipants.name: claude
chatParticipants.description: Send this request directly to Claude through Veyra.

chatParticipants.name: codex
chatParticipants.description: Send this request directly to Codex through Veyra.

chatParticipants.name: gemini
chatParticipants.description: Send this request directly to Gemini through Veyra.

veyra.toolCallRenderStyle.description: How tool calls (file reads, edits, terminal commands) are displayed in the chat.

veyra.hangDetectionSeconds.description: Seconds with no output from an agent before showing a 'still waiting?' notice. Set to 0 to disable.

veyra.watchdogMinutes.description: Maximum minutes an agent may hold the dispatch floor before it's force-released. Set to 0 to disable.

veyra.fileEmbedMaxLines.description: Maximum lines embedded per @file mention before truncating.

veyra.workspaceContext.maxFiles.description: Maximum number of files selected for @codebase workspace context.

veyra.workspaceContext.maxSnippetLines.description: Maximum lines included per selected @codebase context file snippet.

veyra.workspaceContext.maxFileBytes.description: Maximum file size Veyra will read while retrieving @codebase context.

veyra.diffPreview.enabled.description: Capture and surface pending Veyra agent changes for VS Code diff review, acceptance, or rejection.

veyra.diffPreview.maxFileBytes.description: Maximum file size Veyra snapshots for pending change diff preview and rejection.

veyra.checkpoints.enabled.description: Capture Veyra-managed checkpoints before write-capable dispatches and allow manual checkpoints.

veyra.checkpoints.maxFileBytes.description: Maximum file size Veyra snapshots for checkpoint rollback.

veyra.checkpoints.maxCount.description: Maximum number of Veyra checkpoints to keep before pruning older snapshots.

veyra.codexCliPath.patternErrorMessage: Use a path ending in codex.js, codex.exe, codex, codex.cmd, codex.bat, or codex.ps1.
veyra.codexCliPath.description: Optional absolute path to the Codex CLI JS bundle, native executable such as codex.exe, or Windows npm shim. Shim paths such as codex.cmd are resolved to the underlying JS bundle before launch. Environment variable VEYRA_CODEX_CLI_PATH takes precedence.

veyra.geminiCliPath.patternErrorMessage: Use a path ending in gemini.js, gemini.exe, gemini, gemini.cmd, gemini.bat, or gemini.ps1.
veyra.geminiCliPath.description: Optional absolute path to the Gemini CLI JS bundle, native executable such as gemini.exe, or Windows npm shim. Shim paths such as gemini.cmd are resolved to the underlying JS bundle before launch. Environment variable VEYRA_GEMINI_CLI_PATH takes precedence.

veyra.sharedContextWindow.description: Number of recent user+agent messages included in cross-agent context.

veyra.fileBadges.enabled.description: Show colored dots in the file explorer for files recently edited by an agent.

veyra.commitSignature.enabled.description: Write the .vscode/veyra/active-dispatch sentinel during dispatches so the prepare-commit-msg hook can attribute commits.

veyra.writeApproval.description: How agent file-edit requests are handled. 'auto-edit' grants write access automatically; 'ask' will defer to each CLI's interactive prompt (which currently means writes silently fail in non-interactive mode - switch back to 'auto-edit' if edits stop working).

colors.description: Color used for Claude file decoration badges.
Color used for Codex file decoration badges.
Color used for Gemini file decoration badges.

scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build && npm run verify:package && npm run test:integration && git diff --check
scripts.verify:completion: npm run verify && npm run test:vscode-smoke && npm run verify:live-ready
scripts.verify:goal: npm run verify:completion && npm run test:integration:live
scripts.package:vsix: npm run build && npm run verify:package && node scripts/package-vsix.mjs
scripts.test:integration:live: vitest run --environment node --testTimeout 180000 --exclude ".vscode-test/**" tests/integration/claude.live.test.ts tests/integration/codex.live.test.ts tests/integration/gemini.live.test.ts tests/integration/veyra.live.test.ts
